name: run_macs3_callpeak
description: Call ChIP-seq / ATAC-seq peaks from an aligned reads file with MACS3 `callpeak` (Model-based Analysis of ChIP-Seq; Zhang et al., Genome Biology 2008; macs3-project successor). Models read enrichment over a background/input control to identify regions of significant signal — the field-standard first analysis step after alignment. Input is a server-accessible BAM/BED/BED-PE alignment file; returns the number of peaks, the top-N peaks by score, and summary statistics, parsed from the ENCODE narrowPeak output.

treatment.description: Server-accessible path to the treatment/ChIP alignment file (BAM/BED/BED-PE).

control.description: Server-accessible path to the input/control alignment file (optional but recommended).

format.description: Input format: AUTO (default), BAM, BED, BAMPE, or BEDPE. Use BAMPE/BEDPE for paired-end (e.g. ATAC-seq).

genome_size.description: Effective genome size: 'hs' (human, default), 'mm' (mouse), 'ce' (worm), 'dm' (fly), or a number (e.g. '2.7e9').

qvalue.description: q-value (minimum FDR) cutoff to call significant peaks (default 0.05).

top_n.description: Number of top peaks (by score) to return (default 50).

nomodel.description: Skip the shift-model step (pass --nomodel --extsize). Required for ATAC-seq / single-end data where model building fails. Default false.

extsize.description: Fragment extension size used with nomodel (default 200; ~147 for ATAC).

n_peaks.description: Total number of significant peaks called.

top_peaks.description: Top-N peaks by score, each with chrom, start, end, score, signal_value, q_value.

summary.description: Summary stats: n_peaks, mean/median peak width, max/mean score.

error.description: Error description if the run failed.
